urdu transliteration text:
Laashe Pe Zaynab Roke Pukaari,
Bhayya Humaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: At the dead body, Zainab cried and said 'Brother, we have no one!'

urdu transliteration text:
Khaime Jhale Aur Sajjad Qaidi,
Kafni Tumhara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The tents burned and Sajjad is prisoner, There is no one to give you kafan

urdu transliteration text:
Look at me Oh brother, Zahra’s daughter
Dekho Ay Bhai Me Zahra Ki Jaayi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Laashe Pe Aayi Hu Be Parda Hokar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I have come to your body without hijab

urdu transliteration text:
Maara Gaya Hay Abbas Ghaazi,
Qassim Dulaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Abbas has died, Qassim is no more

urdu transliteration text:
Bekas Yatimo Ka Kafela, Bhai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: This caravan of helpless orphans, Oh Brother

urdu transliteration text:
Tuhi Bataade Ke Kahaa Leke Jaawu
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You tell me, where I should take them?

urdu transliteration text:
Laashe Sambhaalun Ya Kumbe Ko Dekhu, Gham Ka Kinaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Should I take care of the dead bodies, or watch over the clan? There is no one to share my grief

urdu transliteration text:
Wiraa Hay Khaime, Khaali Hay Jhula
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The tents are deserted,the cradle is empty

urdu transliteration text:
Tishna Sakina Ke Qisse Ko Dekho
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Look at the story of your beloved Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Gir Kar Huwi Chot Be Aas Beti,
Ab To Sahaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sakina is injured from falling, Now there is no support

urdu transliteration text:
The youth’s dead body has come
Kariyal Jawaan Ki Mayyat Hay Aayi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Laila says, 'Oh my Akbar!'
Kehti Hay Laila ‘Ay Mere Akber’
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Kiski Nazar Tumko Khaa Gayi Beta, Mera Sahaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Whose evil look has done this to you son, I have no support

urdu transliteration text:
Zahra’s daughter cried and said,
Boli Yun Ro Ke Zahra Ki Jaayi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Karbala Me Ghar Lut Gaya Hay
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: My home has been robbed in Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Maara Gaya Hay Ab Mera Bhaai, Waaris Hamara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Now my brother is dead, We have no one to protect us

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab said, 'Aun and Muhammad'
Boli Ye Zainab ‘Auno Muhammad’
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Wake up my beloved sons, your mother has come
Utho Ay Pyaaro Aayi Hay Maadar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Baate To Karlo, Bolo Ay Pyaaro,
Gham Ka Kinaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Talk to me oh my beloveds, There is no one to share my grief

urdu transliteration text:
Tiir Se Maara Asghare Besheer
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: They killed Asghar with an arrow

urdu transliteration text:
Paani Na Paaya Haay Who Bachaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The child could not get any water

urdu transliteration text:
Aawo Ay Beta Khaali Hay Jhula,
Jhulne Waala Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Come, oh son, the cradle is empty, there is no one to swing the cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Gham Ki Kahaani Kisko Sunaawu
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Who should I tell this story of grief

urdu transliteration text:
Bhayya Hammara Tum Bhi Chale
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh my brother, you have left

urdu transliteration text:
Sajjad Bimaar Hum Hay Qaidi, Waris Hamaara Koi Nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sajjad is sick and we are prisoners, We have no one to protect us

urdu transliteration text:
Karbala Me Humko Bulaana
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Call us to Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Aake Wahaa Hum Parle Ziyaarat
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We will come and recite Ziyarrat

urdu transliteration text:
Meri Tamanna Aawu Wahaa Me,
Iske Siwaa Koi Aarzoo Nahin
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: My wish is to go there, other than this I have no other wish
